svg.text: Full flow — OSPF Hello from timer to wire

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the OSPF hello timer work — is it a kernel timer or userspace?')
sendPrompt('What does the OSPF process write into the Hello packet buffer?')
g.text: OSPF common hdr + Hello body + neighbor list

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the sendto() call for a raw socket and what options does OSPF set?')
sendPrompt('How does the IP layer handle a raw socket packet with IP_HDRINCL?')
sendPrompt('How is the multicast MAC address 01:00:5e:00:00:05 derived from 224.0.0.5?')
sendPrompt('How does dev_queue_xmit push the sk_buff to the NIC for OSPF?')
g.text: sk_buff → NIC TX ring → DMA → wire

svg.text: LSU/LSA: same path but dst may be unicast (224.0.0.6 for DR) or neighbor IP — ARP fires if unicast
ARP: skips steps 1–3 entirely — kernel neigh subsystem injects directly, no socket
